title: Senko San Bread
description: This texture pack adds bread in the form of Senko San from the anime Sewayaki Kitsune no Senko-san to the game. At the same time, it does not deviate from the game's style and is perfect for vanilla survival.
body: This texture pack adds bread in the form of Senko San from the anime Sewayaki Kitsune no Senko-san to the game. At the same time, it does not deviate from the game's style and is perfect for vanilla survival.
